title: Nrisingha Temple
tagline: Nrisingha Temple — spiritual town of West Bengal

overview.short: Nrisingha Temple, Nadia, is an old Narasimha temple situated at Thakurtala, Nrisinghapally, beside Nabadwip-Krishnagar road in Nadia district, in the Indian state of West Bengal.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nrisingha Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nrisingha Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nrisingha Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (82 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (90 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nrisingha Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nrisingha Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nrisingha Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Nrisingha Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nrisingha Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Krishnanagar I, Bishnupur, Nadia, Nabadwip (community development block), Paschimbhatjangla, Gadigachha.
